allow: Bash(git -c user.name="STool" -c user.email="stool@local" commit -q -m "settings: remove sidebar icons + clipboard settings tab; crisper text \(UseLayoutRounding + ClearType\)")
Bash(git -c user.name="STool" -c user.email="stool@local" commit -q -m "settings: click-to-capture hotkey box \(HotkeyBox\); remove dotted focus rect on content")
Bash(git -c user.name="STool" -c user.email="stool@local" commit -q -m "fix: suspend global hotkeys while a HotkeyBox is focused so combos can be recorded \(was intercepted by RegisterHotKey\)")
Bash(cd "e:/Data/Project/STool" && taskkill //IM STool.exe //F 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; dotnet build 2>&1 | tail -4; rm -f obj/_*.ps1 obj/_*.png obj/_*.txt 2>/dev/null; echo "temp cleaned")
